articles.title: Liverpool's Downward Spiral Continues With 2-1 Loss To Brighton
articles.description: Liverpool's troubles in the Premier League intensified with a 2-1 loss at Brighton on Saturday.

topStories.title: Donald Trump says he's 'glad' after death of former special counsel Robert Mueller
topStories.description: Donald Trump said he was “glad” after the death of Robert Mueller, who led the Russia probe. Mueller died aged 81 after Parkinson’s, as tributes came from others.

topStories.title: "Glad He's Dead": Trump On Death Of Ex-FBI Head Who Probed Russia Ties

topStories.title: Supreme Court concerned over cops uploading videos online, says poses threat to fair trial
topStories.description: The senior counsel flagged the recent trend of police posting the images of accused persons being handcuffed, tied by ropes, paraded, forced to kneel, etc, on social media, which, apart from causing an affront to personal dignity, adds to the public bias.

topStories.title: BRICS's independent role, ‘immediate cessation’ of US-Israel conflict and more: Inside Iran Prez's call with PM Modi
topStories.description: Iran President Masoud Pezeshkian urged PM Modi for an immediate end to US-Israeli ‘aggression’ and called on BRICS to help stop attacks on Iran. PM Modi condemned the attacks in the Middle East and emphasised the importance of secure shipping routes amid Strait of Hormuz disruptions.

topStories.title: Government Shutdown: Trump threatens to put 'brilliant and patriotic ICE agents' in airports
topStories.description: Trump threatened to deploy ICE agents to airports amid the ongoing government shutdown, emphasizing the arrest of illegal immigrants, particularly those from Somalia. TSA personnel are facing missed paychecks, prompting some to seek alternative income sources.

topStories.title: MAGA fans swoon over ‘Jessica Foster’ warship photos in Strait of Hormuz, but ‘US Army soldier’ never existed
topStories.description: Images believed to be created using artificial intelligence portrayed Foster as a US Army soldier leading an extraordinary, high-profile life aligned with the ‘America First’ agenda.

topStories.description: The reason lies far beyond the village, in Iran, where the death of Ayatollah Ali Khamenei in airstrikes by the US and Israel has left a deep emotional impact

dailyNews.description: Iran President Pezeshkian said the discussions with PM Narendra Modi covered bilateral ties as well as “regional and international developments”.

dailyNews.title: Elon Musk offers to pay salaries of unpaid TSA staff due to partial government shutdown
dailyNews.description: Amid the partial US government shutdown, Elon Musk proposed covering TSA personnel salaries. Essential TSA workers are struggling without pay, leading to staff shortages and long wait times at airports. Reports indicate some employees are seeking extra jobs or assistance.

dailyNews.title: US & its allies' ‘attempts to silence voice’: Iranian-linked hacking group as its website back after FBI seized domains
dailyNews.description: Following a cyberattack on Stryker, the Iranian-linked Handala Hack Team's website went back online after the FBI seized its domains. The group claimed the seizures were attempts to suppress their voice, while Stryker is working to restore its systems and confirmed product safety.

dailyNews.title: Duggar couple arrested: What are the new charges against Joseph Duggar and Kendra Duggar?
dailyNews.description: Former reality star Joseph Duggar will be transferred to Florida to face child molestation charges after waiving his extradition hearing. He faces serious allegations, including false imprisonment, mirroring past legal troubles of his brother, Josh Duggar, who was convicted of child sexual abuse.

dailyNews.title: Iranian man, Romanian woman arrested trying to enter UK's Falsane nuclear base amid Israel-US' conflict with Iran
dailyNews.description: The man and the woman are due to appear at Dumbarton Sheriff Court on Monday. It also mentioned that enquiries are currently underway

dailyNews.description: There are several ways the United States could attempt to reopen the waterway, all of which carry substantial risks.

dailyNews.description: The current restrictions on the internet in Iran are coinciding with Nowruz, the observance of the Persian New Year.

dailyNews.description: For the first time since the U.S. launched a war on Iran, this week top intelligence officials spoke publicly about the conflict.

dailyNews.title: Former special counsel and FBI director Robert Mueller dies at age 81
dailyNews.description: Robert Mueller, the former FBI director and special counsel who oversaw the investigation into Russian interference in the 2016 election, has died at the age of 81. NBC News' Julie Tsirkin reports that President Donald Trump posted in a statement on social media that he was quote "glad" about Mueller's death.

dailyNews.title: Robert Mueller, former special counsel who led Trump-Russia probe, dies at 81
dailyNews.description: Robert Mueller III, the long-serving FBI director who later served as the special counsel overseeing the investigation into Russian interference in the 2016 election, has died.

dailyNews.title: Trump says he's sending immigration agents to airports on Monday amid DHS shutdown
dailyNews.description: President Donald Trump on Saturday said he would send ICE agents to airports around the U.S. on Monday amid an ongoing standoff between Senate Republicans and Democrats over funding for the Department of Homeland Security."If the Democrats do not allow for Just and Proper Security at our Airports, and elsewhere throughout our Country, ICE will do the job far better than ever done before!" he wrote in a post on Truth Social, adding later, "I look forward to moving ICE in on Monday, and have alrea

dailyNews.title: Trump threatens to deploy ICE agents to airports if DHS shutdown doesn't end, while Elon Musk offers to cover TSA agents' pay
dailyNews.description: President Trump claimed ICE agents handling airport security would arrest immigrants who are in the U.S. illegally.

dailyNews.title: Analysis: Trump's unshackled presidency puts him at the center of the economy
dailyNews.description: The president's unprecedented use of executive power has made him a driving force behind oil prices, the Federal Reserve's interest rates and more.

dailyNews.title: Opinion: As Trump eyes Cuba, my trips there a decade ago remind me how different things were
dailyNews.description: Trump has threatened a 'friendly takeover' of Cuba after cutting it off from Venezuela's oil. CNBC's Justin Solomon reflects how different things used to be.
